name: yt-music-floating-lyrics
description: Desktop floating synced lyrics for YouTube Music on Windows.
author: ACER

scripts.check: node --check chrome-extension/content.js && node --check chrome-extension/background.js && node --check native-host/src/server.mjs && node --check native-host/src/lyricsService.mjs && node --check native-host/src/lyricsUtils.mjs && node --check native-host/src/providers/lrcLibProvider.mjs && node --check native-host/src/providers/staticLyricsProvider.mjs && node --check overlay-app/overlay.js && node --check overlay-app/serve-overlay.mjs && node --check desktop-overlay/main.cjs && node --check desktop-overlay/playback-preload.cjs && node --check scripts/smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/start-desktop.mjs
